### Post by scope123 on 2009-10-13
ChatScripts File looks like this
 
# !/bin/bash
# This chatfile was generated by pppconfig 2.3.18
# Please do not delete any of the comments pppconfig needs them
 
#
# ispauth PAP
# abortstring
ABORT BUSY
ABORT 'NO CARRIER'
ABORT 'NO DIALTONE'
#modeminit
'' ATZ
#ispnumber
OK-AT-OK "ATDT#777"
#ispconnect
CONNECT '\d\c'
#prelogin
 
#ispname
#isppassword
#postlogin
 
# end of pppconfig stuff

### Post by scope123 on 2009-10-13
under /etc/ppp/peers/ZTE file Looks like this
 
#This option was generated by pppconfig 2.3.18
#
#
hide-password
noauth
connect "/usr/sbin/chat -v -f /etc/chatscripts/ZTE"
debug
ttyUSB0
115200
defaultroute
noipdefault
user "mytelephonenumber"        
remotename ZTE
ipparam ZTE
usepeerdns
lcp-echo-failure 0
lcp-echo-interval 0
